title: State Drug Alert: 111 Batches Including Paracetamol, Telmisartan Fail CDSCO Quality Tests
summary: New Delhi: Continuing its nationwide surveillance of drug quality, the Central Drugs Standard Control Organisation (CDSCO) has flagged 111 drug, cosmetic and medical device samples as Not of Standard...
thbAction: Position THB's pharma CRM and omnichannel HCP engagement workflows to support launch planning, KAM orchestration, and compliant follow-up across India and the Middle East.
